meaning: n.沙得拉(基督教<<圣经>>中被Nebuchadnezzar俘获的三人之一)
examples: Then Nebuchadnezzar said, Praise be to the God of Shadrach, Meshach and Abednego, who has sent his angel and rescued his servants!
Nebuchadnezzar spake and said unto them, Is it true, O Shadrach, Meshach, and Abednego, do not ye serve my gods, nor worship the golden image which I have set up?
Then Daniel requested of the king, and he set Shadrach, Meshach, and Abednego, over the affairs of the province of Babylon: but Daniel sat in the gate of the king.
His composition, "New (Shadrach, Meshach, Abednego), " is the opening salvo of "The Faith Suite, " a six-part suite on devotion.
